heroHeadline: Global Fusion Race Accelerates After Historic Ignition
heroSubtitle: From NIF's December 2022 ignition breakthrough to EAST's 1,066-second plasma record, the race to commercial fusion has never moved faster — or drawn more investment.
footerNote: Data sourced from DOE/LLNL, ITER Organization, peer-reviewed journals (Nature, Physical Review Letters), and the Fusion Industry Association. All milestones independently verified.
